---
title: "On the design of Social Voting Recommendation Applications"
author: "Tsapatsoulis, N., Agathokleous, M., Djouvas, C. and Mendez, F."
date: 2015-01-01
description: "International Journal on Artificial Intelligence Tools, 24(3): 1550009"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
